name: Rustic Herbed Apricot Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, halved and thinly sliced
1 tablespoon Chopped flat-leaf parsley, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken pieces and pat dry.
2. In a large bowl, combine 1/4 cup olive oil, chopped garlic, balsamic vinegar, dried thyme, tarragon, and half teaspoon of black pepper. Add the chicken and toss together well. Marinate at room temperature for 2-3 hours or refrigerate overnight.
3. Remove chicken from marinade, scraping off any bits that remain. Reserve the marinade. Heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large, heavy casserole.
4. Brown chicken in small batches over medium heat until golden, turning once or twice. Set finished pieces aside.
5. Add onion slices to the casserole and reduce heat. Cook, stirring for 2 minutes or until they begin to brown. Toss onion slices with flour and continue cooking, stirring constantly, for another 2 minutes.
6. Add broth, tawny port, red currant jelly, and reserved marinade. Cook, stirring, for another 2 minutes. Stir in the apricots and chicken.
7. Cook over low heat, partially covered, for 20 minutes. Remove cover and cook for an additional 20-30 minutes or until chicken is cooked through. Season with salt and pepper to taste. If desired, serve with cooked noodles and garnish with chopped parsley.
